executives.name: James Kerr II
executives.background: Mr. Kerr is chairman, president and CEO of Southern Company Gas and executive vice president of Southern Company. He previously served as chief legal officer and chief compliance officer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, General Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer

executives.name: Paula Rosput Reynolds
executives.background: Paula Reynolds is the President and CEO of Preferential Ltd. She previously served as Vice Chairman and Chief Restructuring Officer of AIG and Chairman and CEO of Safeco Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman, President and Chief Executive Officer

board_of_directors.name: Paula Rosput Reynolds
